mapper.update: update sb_user_permission_dept set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate(), del_flag = '1' where user_id = #{userId} and ifnull(del_flag, '0') = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into sb_user_permission_dept (id, user_id, customer_id, dept_id, create_by, create_time, del_flag) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{customerId}, #{deptId}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), ifnull(#{delFlag}, '0'))

insert into sb_user_permission_dept (id, user_id, customer_id, dept_id, create_by, create_time, del_flag) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.customerId}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.createBy}, sysdate(), ifnull(#{item.delFlag}, '0'))
on duplicate key update delete_by = null, delete_time = null, del_flag = '0'
